caption: In an outdoor setting with a dusty ground and brick structures in the background, a group of children are gathered. A boy wearing a light-colored long-sleeved shirt stands facing another boy who is wearing a red and purple striped long-sleeved shirt and a patterned wrap around his waist. As the sequence progresses, the boy in the striped shirt smiles and interacts with the other boy, eventually raising his right arm and gesturing with his hand. Several other children are visible in the periphery, including one in a red and yellow patterned garment. White on-screen text appears across the bottom of the scene, reading "that when we want something we aim for it." The scene remains focused on the interaction between the two central boys, with subtle shifts in their posture and facial expressions as they engage with one another.
